title: Wedding Planning 婚礼筹备
scene: 和婚礼策划师讨论婚礼方案

lines.speaker: Bride
lines.content: We want a small outdoor wedding with about fifty guests. Is that possible in spring?
lines.cn: 我们想要一个大约五十人的小型户外婚礼。春天办可以吗？

lines.speaker: Planner
lines.content: Absolutely. Spring is a beautiful season for outdoor weddings. Do you have a venue in mind?
lines.cn: 当然可以。春天是户外婚礼的好季节。你有心仪的场地吗？

lines.speaker: Bride
lines.content: We are thinking about the garden at the Rose Hotel. It looks lovely in photos.
lines.cn: 我们在考虑玫瑰酒店的花园。照片里看起来很美。

lines.speaker: Planner
lines.content: That is a popular choice. I can check their availability for May or June. What is your budget?
lines.cn: 那是个很受欢迎的选择。我可以查一下五月或六月有没有空档。你的预算多少？

lines.speaker: Bride
lines.content: We would like to keep it under fifteen thousand dollars. Is that realistic?
lines.cn: 我们想控制在15,000美元以内。现实吗？

lines.speaker: Planner
lines.content: Yes, for fifty guests, that is very doable. We can find a nice package within your budget.
lines.cn: 可以，五十位宾客的话完全能做到。我们可以在预算内找到不错的套餐。

lines.speaker: Bride
lines.content: Great. Can you also help with flowers and decorations? I want a romantic and simple style.
lines.cn: 太好了。你还能帮忙安排花艺和装饰吗？我想要浪漫简约的风格。

lines.speaker: Planner
lines.content: Of course. I will prepare a mood board for you. Soft colors and fairy lights would be perfect.
lines.cn: 当然。我会给你准备一份 mood board。柔和的颜色和串灯会很完美。

lines.speaker: Bride
lines.content: That sounds dreamy. When can we meet again to discuss the menu and music?
lines.cn: 听起来很梦幻。我们什么时候可以再见面讨论菜单和音乐？

lines.speaker: Planner
lines.content: How about next Tuesday? I will have all the details ready by then.
lines.cn: 下周二怎么样？到时候我会把所有细节准备好。
